overview: G. Pulla Reddy Engineering College (GPREC), established in 1985 by the legendary philanthropist G. Pulla Reddy, is a premier autonomous engineering institution in Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh. It is one of the earliest private engineering colleges in the state and has built a formidable reputation for academic discipline and technical excellence. The college serves as a significant hub for engineering education in the Rayalaseema region, fostering a culture of research and professional development.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous status. Accredited by NAAC with an 'A+' Grade (CGPA of 3.22). All eligible UG programs are NBA accredited. Approved by AICTE and affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Anantapur (JNTUA).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, AI&DS, CS&BS, ECE, EEE, ME, CE, CST)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + AP EAPCET rank

coursesAndFees.course: M.Tech (CSE, VLSI & Embedded Systems, Structural Engg, etc.)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: B.E./B.Tech with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ST) + GATE / AP PGECET score
Graduation with Maths at 10+2 or Degree level + AP ICET rank
Master's degree in relevant field with 55% aggregate

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through state-level web counseling (APSCHE). 70% of seats (Category A) are filled via entrance exam ranks (Counseling Code: GPRE). 30% are Management Quota (Category B) seats filled based on merit or JEE Main scores.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET 2026: May 12–18, 2026; AP ICET 2026 Rank Card: May 16, 2026; GATE 2026 Scorecard: Until May 31, 2026.

campus.area: Acres of lush green, well-landscaped campus
facilities: ICT Enabled Classrooms & AC Seminar Halls
Central Library with Digital Section and E-Resources
Separate Hostels for Boys and Girls (Total capacity ~1500)
Modern Indoor Stadium & Outdoor Sports Grounds
Extensive Transport Fleet for local students
campus.specialNote: GPREC is highly regarded for its 'Quality Improvement Program' and various technical clubs like the Robotics Club and Coding Club. The college also maintains a strong focus on community service through its active NSS unit.

contact.address: G.Pulla Reddy Nagar, Nandyal Road, Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh - 518007
